variants: Daniela Lupulescu has established herself in the aerospace engineering sector, with her professional journey greatly impacted by her mentor, Hikaru Ishibashi. In addition to her engineering skills, she is actively involved with the Peregrine Leatherworkers, which enriches her creative capabilities. Daniela holds the Ripple Doctor Badge, affirming her professional competence in her field. She has primarily funded her projects through support from the Whisper Ridge Society, allowing her to explore innovative ideas in aerospace engineering.
